description: Append-only ledger of agent-readiness measurements. Each row is a single measurement at a HEAD; rows are never edited or deleted.

runs.notes: Pre-improvement baseline. Captured before evals/ + .husky hooks landed; subsequent measurements re-score against the same rubric so trend is visible in docs/ai-readiness-map.html.
